allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['public_url']\) for t in d.get\('tunnels',[]\)]")
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { "PID: $\($_.OwningProcess\)" }; Get-Process -Id $conn[0].OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id,MainWindowTitle } else { "No process found" })
PowerShell(try { $t = \(Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:4040/api/tunnels"\).tunnels; $t | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.proto\): $\($_.public_url\)" } } catch { "ngrok API not ready: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3011" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -MaximumRedirection 0; "Admin-web: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { "Admin-web: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" } else { "Not ready: $_" } })
PowerShell(docker exec bingo_local_postgres psql -U bingo_user -d bingo_db -c "\\dt" 2>&1)
